name: Berried Avocado Grapefruit Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 avocados - seed removed, skin peeled, and sliced
Prepared sweet vinegar and oil dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Line serving platter or individual salad plates with lettuce and watercress.
2. Arrange avocado, grapefruit, and raspberries over the greens.
3. Sprinkle with dressing.
